channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: MP Board Class 10th and 12th Results 2026 Information and Scorecard Access
item.description: The MP Board Class 10th and 12th results for 2026 are scheduled for release, and students across Madhya Pradesh are eagerly awaiting their scores. While the official result page was meant to provide l...

item.title: Ruto launches major development projects in Kisii and Nyamira counties
item.description: President William Ruto has embarked on a four-day tour across Kisii and Nyamira counties with a focus on multi-billion-shilling infrastructure and development projects. The visit is seen as a politica...

item.title: Australia's Defence Strategy: Lessons from Ukraine's Drone Warfare
item.description: The Albanese government has announced a significant investment – A$2 to A$5 billion – in drones and counter-drone systems, bringing total spending over the decade to A$12 to A$15 billion. This move co...

item.title: V&A East Celebrates 125 Years of Black British Music with Landmark Exhibition
item.description: A new exhibition, 'The Music Is Black: A British Story', has opened at the V&A East in London’s Olympic Park, showcasing 125 years of Black British music. The exhibition, the inaugural display at the ...

item.title: Trump Reiterates Criticism of Pope Leo Amid US-Iran Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has once again criticised Pope Leo regarding his comments on the US war and immigration policies. On Truth Social, Trump urged that someone should inform Pope Leo about Iran'...

item.title: Ancient DNA Shows Family Connections Across Neolithic Tombs in Scotland
item.description: A recent study of Neolithic tombs in northern Scotland has unveiled intricate family connections among early farming communities. Led by Vicki Cummings of Cardiff University and published in Antiquity...

item.title: Ruto Faces IMF Concerns Amid Hidden Debt and Coalition Tensions
item.description: Kenyan newspapers on April 15, 2026, highlighted a range of political and economic issues affecting the country. The Daily Nation reports tensions within the coalition government, with ODM leader Obur...

item.title: Prince Harry speaks on parenting and personal growth during Australia visit
item.description: During his visit to Australia, Prince Harry shared reflections on fatherhood and parenting. He talked about how becoming a dad has shaped his perspective and encouraged fathers to try and improve upon...

item.title: Jets fall 5-3 to Utah in season-ending road game
item.description: The Winnipeg Jets concluded their final road game of the NHL season with a 5-3 loss to the Utah Mammoth. With playoff contention out of reach, the team is now focused on maintaining a strategy that co...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens rest key players in final regular-season game, losing 4-2 to Flyers
item.description: In their final regular-season game, the Montreal Canadiens fell 4-2 to the Philadelphia Flyers in a match that had little impact on standings. Head coach Martin St. Louis chose to rest key players inc...

item.title: ADC Convention Highlights: Aregbesola Criticizes INEC, Calls for Opposition Unity Ahead of 2027
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) recently held a convention marked by strong criticism of the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) and a call for increased collaboration amongst oppos...

item.title: Review launched into federal department secretaries' salaries after years without full assessment
item.description: An independent review has been announced by Australia’s Remuneration Tribunal to examine whether the pay arrangements for federal departmental secretaries remain appropriate and effective. This marks ...

item.title: Karl Urban reflects on the human side of 'The Boys' final season
item.description: The latest article from The Sydney Morning Herald delves into the return of The Boys on Prime Video for its long-awaited final season. Karl Urban, who stars as the gritty antihero Billy Butcher, discu...

item.title: Tom Wright returns for Brumbies as Charlie Cale sidelined with shoulder injury
item.description: The ACT Brumbies face a mixed week ahead of their Super Rugby clash against the Fijian Drua at Canberra Stadium. Star fullback Tom Wright makes a highly anticipated return after an ACL injury sustaine...

item.title: Jorginho Frello publicly apologizes to Chappell Roan for hotel misunderstanding and clarifies situation
item.description: Brazilian football star Jorginho Frello has issued a public apology to American singer Chappell Roan following an awkward incident at a hotel that drew widespread online attention. According to report...

item.title: Maendeleo Bank reports strong profit growth on increased lending and deposit expansion
item.description: Maendeleo Bank has posted robust financial results for the year ending December 2025, achieving a 29 percent increase in net profit compared to the previous year. The audited statements show net profi...

item.title: Xi Jinping holds talks with Russian FM amid global attention on Middle East conflict
item.description: On Wednesday, Chinese President Xi Jinping met Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov as part of a busy week in Beijing where several world leaders are arriving due to the ongoing Middle East war. Lav...

item.title: Nakuru Woman Shares Story After Sister Killed in Domestic Dispute
item.description: A family in Nakuru county is in deep mourning after Mary Njoki Mburu, aged 42, was allegedly killed by her lover, Paul Ndung'u, following a domestic dispute. Njoki, a mother of three, reportedly attem...

item.title: ADC Convention Ends with Constitutional Changes and New Leadership Under David Mark
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don successfully conclude im national convention for Abuja, where delegates overwhelmingly agree to amend the party constitution. Out of 1,576 accredited delegate...

item.title: Large Ice Block Falls Through Roof of Whittier Home, FAA Investigates Possible Aircraft Link
item.description: On Friday, a sizable block of ice unexpectedly crashed through the roof of a rental home in Whittier, California, striking the living room where Yudar Grau had been seated moments before. The homeowne...
